message:
feat(cli): add capability tokens and approval tokens to live execution commands

Enable fwc live execution commands to accept authorization material
(capability tokens and approval tokens) for policy-aware execution
against live hosts.

CLI surface changes (main.rs):
- Add LiveAuthArgs struct with capability_token, capability_token_file,
  approval_token, approval_token_file fields
- Flatten LiveAuthArgs into InvokeArgs, RecipeRunArgs, PipelineRunArgs,
  MapArgs, BatchFileArgs, ServeMcpArgs
- Rename ExportToolsArgs.format to tool_format (--tool-format flag)
- Add --zone parameter to recipe/pipeline/map/batch commands
- Add --principal parameter to ServeMcpArgs
- Validate --host required for live execution commands
- Reject --zone on serve-mcp (cache-aware inventory limitation)
- Add missing_host_dispatch() and live_auth_dispatch() error paths
- Update help examples with --host parameter pattern

Supporting changes:
- intent.rs: Add auth token intent field support
- render.rs: Add auth/token output format
- serve_mcp.rs: Add capability token verification to MCP server setup
- supply_chain_cmd.rs: Minor supply chain command enhancement
- recovery.rs: Add recovery logic for inventory mutations and new
  aliases (diagnose/diagnostics, budgets/usage/spend, caps/permissions)
  and typo corrections (docotr, budgte, capabilties)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
